expectations.text: The review does NOT flag the FlexibleTLS comment as a dependency direction or upstream reference violation
expectations.evidence: Issues found: stub no-op, nil-guard, signature change, missing tests. No finding mentions the comment. The comment was not flagged.

expectations.text: If the review mentions the comment at all, it is not categorized as an architectural issue
expectations.evidence: The comment is not mentioned anywhere in the review output.
